summary: Stripe LIVE mode verification iteration 145 - All tests passed. Backend API tests confirm pk_live_* key returned from /api/payments/config. Invalid session IDs (test, null, undefined) correctly return 400 errors. Backend logs confirm STRIPE LIVE MODE VERIFIED. No TEST MODE indicators found in frontend checkout flow. Guest order endpoint available and working.

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_API_KEY both set to sk_live_* in backend/.env
REACT_APP_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY set to pk_live_* in frontend/.env
Session ID validation correctly rejects test/null/undefined with 400 status
Guest order endpoint (/api/page-orders/guest) correctly returns 404 for non-existent pages
